title: taraxacum halophilum
intro: Taraxacum halophilum, also known as the saltwort dandelion or halophilic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and fluid retention. The health benefits of Taraxacum halophilum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and support liver function, among others. Taraxacum halophilum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
